candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Best direct total for short-term debt/current portion of LTD; excludes need to sum components. Prefer this over component maturities when available.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Represents current maturities of long-term debt, but may be only a component if a broader short-term debt total exists.
Could represent short-term borrowings, but shown mostly blank and may overlap if total short-term debt line exists.
Current-section interest-bearing loans appears to capture current borrowings; possible fallback when direct STD line is blank.

final_choice.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt

variables.notes: R:c. Priority list provided because labels appear to change over time. Prefer 'Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt' when populated; otherwise the current-liability-section 'Interest bearing loans' is the best non-lease short-term debt line. Excluded 'Lease liabilities' per instructions and avoided adding 'Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year' alongside the total to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current income tax liability.
Could denote current tax liability, but appears blank in preview and is less explicit than 'Unpaid Income Tax'.
Could include taxes or other state payables, but not specific enough.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided. Chose explicit tax-payable style labels from the balance sheet, with 'Unpaid Income Tax' preferred. Included 'Current tax' as lower-priority alternate label for years where terminology may differ.
